name: ADR validator emits a structured per-ADR record for downstream tooling consumption
command: mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0001 First\nstatus: accepted\n' > docs/adr/0001-first.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/adr/validate-supersedes.sh" --adr-dir docs/adr --emit json --out result.json 2>err.txt && grep -q '"adr_id":"0001"' result.json && grep -q '"status":"accepted"' result.json && echo ok 1>&2
